dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal applies moving average separately to highs and lows. Calculation period marked AUTHOR_SILENT; used sma_20 as reasonable default for n-day moving average. Long entry when high crosses above the MA of highs; short entry when low crosses below the MA of lows. Exit conditions reversed: long exits on low crossing below MA, short exits on high crossing above MA, creating natural reversal logic.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal applies moving average separately to highs and lows. Calculation period marked AUTHOR_SILENT; used sma_20 as reasonable default for n-day moving average. Long entry when high crosses above the MA of highs; short entry when low crosses below the MA of lows. Exit conditions reversed: long exits on low crossing below MA, short exits on high crossing above MA, creating natural reversal logic.

source_rule_text: Enter long positions when today's high crosses above the moving average of the highs, and enter short positions when today's low crosses below the moving average of the lows.
